style_summary: A dramatic outdoor editorial poster style combining low-angle lifestyle photography, oversized warped neon typography, film grain, and high-energy youth-culture campaign design.

environment_variables.SUBJECT: main human figure or object
environment_variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: dynamic action performed by the subject
environment_variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: object held, worn, used, or displayed by the subject
environment_variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: sky, hills, architecture, crowd, stage lights, roads, rocks, grass, clouds, dust, or other secondary scenery
environment_variables.MAIN_TEXT: large repeated headline word or phrase
environment_variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: small separator icon such as diamond, dot, slash, star, or warning mark
environment_variables.PHOTO_COLOR_TONE: warm sunlit natural tones with blue sky contrast
environment_variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: streetwear, outdoor fashion, sportswear, festival outfit, or editorial styling

composition.layout_type: poster-like photographic composition with typographic border system
composition.subject_position: subject placed in the lower center or slightly off-center, shot from below so the body extends upward into the frame
composition.typography_position: massive headline typography placed around the edges and behind the subject, cropped by the canvas boundaries
composition.text_scale: headline letters should be extremely large, often too large to fully fit within the image
composition.text_behavior: letters may stretch, shear, warp, curve, compress, or bend around the composition
composition.depth_layering: photographic subject appears in front of some typography while other text sits behind or around the subject
composition.negative_space: open sky or clean background areas should help the neon typography remain readable
composition.cropping: aggressive cropping of letters, limbs, props, and background edges is encouraged
composition.motion_feel: composition should feel unstable, kinetic, loud, and in motion

typography.headline_font_style: ultra-bold condensed display type, custom warped lettering, sharp cuts, italic slant, stretched vertical forms
typography.secondary_font_style: thin uppercase sans-serif, geometric, spaced, minimal, repeated horizontally
typography.headline_treatment: neon solid fill, no outline, very high contrast against sky or landscape
typography.secondary_text_treatment: small repeating uppercase text line separated by accent symbols
typography.readability_rule: headline may be partially cropped but must remain visually recognizable as graphic language

photographic_direction.camera: wide-angle lens, close to the ground, tilted upward
photographic_direction.lighting: hard natural sunlight, warm highlights, deep shadows, outdoor exposure
photographic_direction.texture: visible film grain, slight print noise, mild dust, analog editorial finish
photographic_direction.lens_effect: subtle distortion from wide lens, exaggerated limbs or props near camera

graphic_elements.secondary_type_band: small repeating uppercase phrase running horizontally
graphic_elements.separator_symbols: small neon accent symbols between repeated words
graphic_elements.edge_usage: letters and symbols should extend beyond the canvas edges
graphic_elements.overlay_rule: graphics can partially cover background, but should not hide the key face, action, or product unless intentionally editorial
